name: Redibase Beef and Barley Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 pound beef chuck, cut into 1/2 inch pieces
3 medium potatoes, diced into 1/2 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the salad oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add beef cubes and cook until browned on all sides.
2. Add onions and garlic to the pot. Cook, stirring occasionally, until the onions are translucent.
3. Pour in water and add Beef Redi-Base, barley, paprika, and marjoram. Stir to combine.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to low and let it simmer, partially covered, for about 2 hours or until the beef is tender.
5. Add potatoes, carrots, celery, tomatoes, and peas to the pot. Continue cooking, uncovered, for about 30 minutes or until all vegetables are cooked through.
6. Adjust seasoning if needed with salt and pepper. Serve hot, portioned for 4 people.
